purpose: Central reusable ROS bank used after active complaint clerking. The engine must finish pathological-system ROS for the active complaint(s) first, then complete remaining system ROS without repeating already-covered concepts.

rendering_rules.load_position: after primary complaint clerking and any permitted secondary complaint clerking
rendering_rules.note: A symptom may ask about a concept directly; in that case the ROS question stays available in the bank for other symptoms but should be skipped for the current session if already covered.
rendering_rules.selection_source: Use complaint.targeted_ros and canonical system catalog; do not expand ROS dynamically with ontology calls.
rendering_rules.dedup_policy_note: ROS must skip any question whose canonical_concept was already resolved in complaint clerking, derived detail capture, another ROS item, or history modules.

persistent_vomiting.text: Are you vomiting repeatedly or unable to keep fluids down?

constipation.text: Any constipation or not passing gas?

blood_in_stool.text: Is there red blood in the stool itself, not just on the paper?

hematemesis_or_melena.text: Any vomiting blood or black tarry stool?

abdominal_distension.text: Is your abdomen swollen or more bloated than usual?

dysuria.text: Any burning when you pass urine?

urinary_frequency_or_urgency.text: Any frequent urination or sudden urgency to pass urine?

pregnancy_context.text: Could you be pregnant or are you recently postpartum?

fever.text: Have you had fever or chills?

rigors_or_chills.text: Some people with fever get chills or shaking episodes and some do not. Have you had chills or rigors?

weight_loss.text: Have you been losing weight unintentionally?

jaundice.text: Any yellowing of the eyes or dark urine?

after_eating.text: Does the pain start or worsen after eating?

fatty_food_trigger.text: Is it worse after fatty or greasy meals?

alcohol_trigger.text: Did this begin after alcohol or get worse after alcohol?

trauma_history.text: Any recent blunt or penetrating abdominal trauma?

change_in_bowel_habit.text: Any change in bowel habit or constipation?

leg_weakness.text: Any weakness in one or both legs?

saddle_numbness.text: Any numbness around the groin, buttocks, or inner thighs?

urinary_retention_or_incontinence.text: Any trouble starting urine, retention, or loss of bladder control?

sciatica.text: Does it shoot down the leg below the knee?

night_pain.text: Does it wake you from sleep?

osteoporosis_or_steroid_use.text: Any osteoporosis or long-term steroid use?

flank_pain_or_hematuria.text: Any flank pain, urinary symptoms, or blood in urine?

abdominal_pulsation_or_tearing_pain.text: Any abdominal pulsation or tearing pain to the abdomen or chest?

iv_drug_use_or_immunosuppression.text: Any IV drug use, weakened immune system, or recent infection?

exertional_trigger.text: Did it begin during exercise, coughing, straining, or sexual activity?

palpitations.text: Any racing or irregular heartbeat before it happened?

syncope_or_near_syncope.text: Any fainting or feeling like you might pass out?

pleuritic_component.text: Is it worse when you breathe deeply or cough?

tearing_to_back_quality.text: Does it feel tearing or like it goes straight through to the back?

leg_swelling.text: Any swelling or pain in one or both legs?

recent_surgery_or_bed_rest.text: Any recent surgery or prolonged bed rest?

heartburn_or_reflux.text: Any heartburn, sour taste, or pain after meals?

nausea_or_vomiting.text: Any nausea or vomiting with it?

chest_wall_tenderness.text: Is it tender if you press on the chest wall?

unable_to_pass_stool_or_flatus.text: Have you stopped passing stool or gas?
unable_to_pass_stool_or_flatus.ui_label: Unable to pass stool or flatus

last_menstrual_period.text: If it's okay to ask, when was the first day of your last menstrual period?

dry_or_productive.text: Is the cough dry, or are you bringing anything up?

sputum_character.text: If there is sputum, what color and how much is it?

wheeze.text: Any wheezing or whistling sound from the chest?

chest_pain.text: Any chest pain or chest tightness?

stridor.text: Any noisy breathing or throat tightness?

recent_viral_illness.text: Did it start with a cold or flu-like illness?

allergic_triggers.text: Any trigger like pollen, pets, dust, or cold air?

aspiration_or_choking_after_lying_or_eat.text: Any choking, aspiration, or cough after lying down or after eating?
aspiration_or_choking_after_lying_or_eat.ui_label: Aspiration or choking after lying down or eating

smoking_history.text: I ask this routinely because it can affect symptoms like this: do you currently smoke or vape, or have you in the past?

tb_exposure.text: Any close contact with TB or known tuberculosis exposure?

immunocompromised_state.text: Do you have a weakened immune system, cancer treatment, HIV, or medicines like steroids?

pe_leg_swelling.text: Any one-sided leg swelling or calf pain?

prior_clot_history.text: Any past DVT, PE, or clotting disorder?

hearing_loss.text: Any change in hearing or muffled hearing?

tinnitus.text: Any ringing or noise in the ears?

positional_component.text: Is it worse when lying down, standing up, or changing position?

neurologic_symptoms.text: Any weakness, numbness, slurred speech, or trouble swallowing?

diplopia_or_dysarthria.text: Any double vision or slurred speech?

headache_or_neck_pain.text: Any headache or neck pain with it?

cardiovascular_risk.text: Any heart condition, blood pressure problems, or recent illness causing dehydration?

new_medication.text: Did this start after a new medicine or antibiotic?

valsalva_trigger.text: Does it come on with coughing, straining, or blowing your nose?

ear_infection_or_pressure.text: Any recent ear infection, cold, or pressure in the ear?

frequency_or_urgency.text: Are you passing urine more often than usual or feeling a sudden urgent need to go?

haematuria_type.text: If there is blood, is it at the start, end, or throughout the urine? Is it visible to the naked eye or was it found on a test?

retention_or_anuria.text: Are you passing much less urine than usual, or none at all?

visible_blood_clots.text: Have you passed any blood clots?

painless_haematuria.text: Is the blood in the urine painless — without burning or discomfort?

fever_or_rigors.text: Any fever, shaking chills, or rigors?

loin_pain.text: Any severe pain in your flank that comes in waves?

bilateral_symptoms.text: Do you have pain or symptoms on both sides?

sex_related_symptom_timing.text: Do the symptoms seem related to sex or become worse after sex?

prior_sti_history.text: Any past STI history that may be relevant?

recent_catheter.text: Any recent catheter, cystoscopy, or urological procedure?

family_history_bladder_or_kidney_cancer.text: Any family history of bladder or kidney cancer?
family_history_bladder_or_kidney_cancer.ui_label: Family history of bladder or kidney cancer

fever_or_night_sweats.text: Any fever, chills, or drenching night sweats?

rectal_bleeding.text: Any blood noticed when wiping or in the toilet bowl?

cold_intolerance.text: Feeling unusually cold, constipated, or with dry skin and hair?

low_mood_anhedonia.text: Any low mood, loss of interest, or feeling depressed?

sleep_quality.text: Are you sleeping well? Do you feel rested after sleep?

breathlessness_at_rest.text: Any shortness of breath even at rest or with minimal activity?

poor_diet_or_nutrition.text: How is your diet? Any restricted eating, food avoidance, or poor access to food?

menstrual_history.text: For female patients — how heavy are your periods? Any change in cycle?

prior_anaemia.text: Have you been told you have anaemia before? What type?

dehydration_or_low_urine_output.text: Have you been passing much less urine or feeling very dehydrated?

rash_purpura.text: Have you developed a new rash, especially purple spots or bruiselike marks?

sputum.text: Are you bringing up sputum or phlegm?

sore_throat.text: Any sore throat or hoarse voice?

flank_pain.text: Any pain in your side or back near the kidneys?

headache.text: Any headache or sensitivity to light?

neck_stiffness.text: Has your neck felt unusually stiff or painful to move?

altered_mental_status.text: Any confusion, unusual sleepiness, or difficulty staying awake?

animal_exposure.text: Any contact with animals that may be relevant?

untreated_water_exposure.text: Any untreated water or water exposure that may be relevant?

indwelling_device.text: Any catheter, line, stent, or other indwelling device?

weakness.text: Have you had any weakness in your face, arm, or leg?

numbness.text: Have you noticed numbness or tingling anywhere?

speech_change.text: Any trouble speaking or getting words out?

gait_or_balance_problem.text: Any trouble walking, imbalance, or clumsiness?

confusion_or_ams.text: Have you felt confused, unusually drowsy, or mentally different from normal?

seizure_or_collapse.text: Have you had a seizure, blackout, or collapse with this?

aura_status.text: Before or during the headache, do you get a warning stage or aura, or does it happen without one?

aura_features.text: Before it starts, do you ever notice warning symptoms like flashing lights, tingling, or speech changes?

aura_progression_and_timing.text: Do those warning symptoms come before the headache, during it, or both, and do they build up gradually over several minutes or come all at once?

aura_duration.text: About how long do those warning symptoms last, if they happen?

visual_loss.text: Have you had any loss of vision or major drop in vision?

red_eye_or_eye_pain.text: Any red eye or pain in the eye with the headache?

scalp_tenderness.text: Is your scalp tender, especially when brushing your hair or touching it?

jaw_pain_with_chewing.text: Do you get pain in your jaw when chewing?

recent_urti_or_sinus_symptoms.text: Have you recently had sinus pressure, congestion, a cold, or flu-like symptoms?

pregnancy_or_postpartum_context.text: Are you pregnant now or recently postpartum?

medication_overuse_context.text: How often are you taking pain medicine or headache medicine?

anticoagulant_use.text: Do you take blood thinners or medicines that affect bleeding?

household_similar_symptoms.text: Has anyone around you had similar symptoms?

toxic_fume_or_carbon_monoxide_exposure.text: Any exposure to fumes, smoke, heaters, or possible carbon monoxide?

joint_distribution.text: Which joints? Is it the same joints on both sides, or different joints?

swelling_or_redness.text: Any swelling, warmth, or redness over muscles or joints?

morning_stiffness.text: Is it stiff in the morning? If so, for how long?

inability_to_bear_weight.text: Can you stand or bear weight on it?

skin_rash.text: Any skin rash, psoriasis, or unusual skin changes?

eye_symptoms.text: Any red eyes, light sensitivity, or eye pain?

psoriasis_history.text: Any personal or family history of psoriasis?

recent_infection.text: Any recent cold, sore throat, diarrhea, or other infection?

immunocompromised.text: Do you have diabetes, a weakened immune system, or are you on steroids or chemotherapy?

urethral_or_vaginal_symptoms.text: Any urethral discharge, burning urine, or vaginal symptoms?

bowel_symptoms.text: Any bowel problems, especially bloody diarrhoea or abdominal pain?

blood_or_mucus.text: Have you noticed blood or mucus in the stool?

tenesmus_or_urgency.text: Do you feel urgent need to go or like you still need to pass stool after going?

nocturnal_symptoms.text: Does it wake you from sleep at night?

severe_dehydration.text: Are you very thirsty, dizzy, or unable to keep up with fluids?

very_low_urine_output.text: Have you been passing much less urine?

food_exposure.text: Did this start after eating out, unusual food, or food others also ate?

household_illness.text: Has anyone at home or close to you had similar symptoms?

daycare_exposure.text: Any daycare, childcare, or similar exposure where others have been sick?

joint_pain.text: Any joint pain or body aches?

ongoing_confusion.text: Are you still confused, drowsy, or not back to normal?

focal_neurologic_symptoms.text: Any weakness, numbness, speech trouble, or one-sided symptoms?

seizure_features.text: Was there shaking, stiffening, eye deviation, or a witnessed fit?

post_event_weakness.text: Any weakness or heavy feeling after the event?

persistent_confusion.text: Were you still confused or drowsy after the event?

incontinence.text: Any loss of urine or stool during the event?

during_exertion.text: Did it happen during exercise or while exerting yourself?

supine_event.text: Did it happen while lying down?

head_injury.text: Did you strike your head or have neck pain after the fall?

fever_or_meningitic_features.text: Any fever, severe headache, or stiff neck?

substance_or_overdose_concern.text: Any concern for alcohol, recreational drugs, opioids, or overdose?

diabetes_history.text: Do you have diabetes or episodes of low sugar?

alcohol_or_drug_use.text: Any alcohol or drug use beforehand?

standing_trigger.text: Did it happen after standing up or standing for a long time?

dehydration.text: Were you dehydrated or had poor oral intake?

vomiting_or_diarrhea.text: Any vomiting or diarrhea around the time?

orthopnea.text: Do you need more pillows to breathe comfortably at night?

oliguria.text: Are you passing less urine than usual?

rapid_onset.text: Did the swelling come on quickly over days?

unilateral_calf_pain.text: Any pain, tenderness, or redness in one calf?

skin_redness_warmth.text: Is the skin over the swelling red or warm?

recent_immobility.text: Have you been immobile recently — long travel, bed rest, or surgery?

liver_disease.text: Any liver disease, hepatitis, or alcohol-related liver problems?

facial_puffiness.text: Is your face or eyes puffy, especially in the morning?

rapid_or_irregular_rhythm.text: Does your heart feel very fast, irregular, or both?

thyroid_symptoms.text: Any heat intolerance, weight loss, tremor, or other thyroid-like symptoms?

electrolyte_symptoms.text: Any muscle cramps, weakness, or excessive vomiting or diarrhea recently?

anxiety_context.text: Do they happen with anxiety, panic, or a racing mind?

caffeine_alcohol_trigger.text: Do they tend to happen after coffee, alcohol, or energy drinks?

distribution.text: Where did it start and where is it now?

spread.text: Has it spread or changed quickly?

appearance.text: How does it look — flat, raised, blistering, peeling, purple, ring-like, or something else?

itch_or_pain.text: Is it itchy, painful, burning, or not bothering you much?

skin_sloughing_or_blistering.text: Any blistering or peeling of the skin?

facial_or_tongue_swelling.text: Any swelling of the lips, face, or tongue?

mucosal_involvement.text: Any sores or rash in the mouth, eyes, or genital area?

purpura_nonblanching.text: Are there purple spots that do not fade with pressure?

sick_contact_exposure.text: Any sick contact or close contact with someone unwell?

new_pet_or_plant_exposure.text: Any new pet, plant, or outdoor exposure that may be relevant?

chemical_exposure.text: Any chemical or irritant exposure that may be relevant?

tick_or_insect_bite.text: Any tick bite, insect bite, or outdoor exposure?

prodrome.text: Did you feel anything beforehand — dizziness, nausea, visual dimming, chest symptoms, or an aura?

focal_deficit_post_ictal.text: Any weakness, numbness, or speech difficulty after it that wasn't there before?

prior_brain_pathology.text: Any history of brain tumour, stroke, head injury, or meningitis?

hypoglycaemia_concern.text: Do you have diabetes or could your blood sugar have been very low?

alcohol_withdrawal.text: Have you recently stopped or significantly reduced alcohol after heavy use?

substance_or_overdose.text: Any alcohol, recreational drugs, medication overdose, or sudden stopping of a regular drug?

fever_or_meningism.text: Any fever, severe headache, or stiff neck?

seizure_type.text: Was there shaking or stiffening of the whole body, one side only, or just staring and becoming unresponsive?

pleuritic_pain.text: Any sharp pain worse with breathing or coughing?

orthopnea_or_pnd.text: Do you get worse lying flat, or wake up breathless at night?

stridor_or_airway_swelling.text: Any throat tightness, noisy breathing, or swelling of the face or tongue?

anxiety_or_panic_context.text: Did this come with panic, stress, or hyperventilation?

swallowing_difficulty.text: Are you able to swallow normally? Can you swallow fluids?

voice_change.text: Has your voice changed? Does it sound muffled, hoarse, or different?

trismus.text: Can you open your mouth fully, or is it locked or very difficult to open?

airway_compromise.text: Any difficulty breathing or sense of throat tightening?

drooling_or_inability_to_swallow.text: Are you drooling or completely unable to swallow even saliva?

sexual_exposure.text: Any chance of a sexually transmitted infection?

red_hot_swelling.text: Is it red, hot, and inflamed?

drainage_or_discharge.text: Any pus, fluid, or nipple discharge?

regional_infection.text: Any nearby skin infection, dental issue, sore throat, or wound?

systemic_weight_loss_or_night_sweats.text: Any weight loss, fever, or night sweats?
systemic_weight_loss_or_night_sweats.ui_label: Systemic weight loss or night sweats

airway_or_swallowing_effect.text: Any trouble breathing, swallowing, or voice change?

thyroid_pressure_symptoms.text: If in the neck, any pressure, swallowing trouble, or voice change?

breast_skin_or_nipple_change.text: If in the breast area, any dimpling, peau d'orange, nipple inversion, or discharge?

leg_swelling_pattern.text: If in the leg, is it one-sided swelling with pain or warmth?

neurologic_or_vascular_compromise.text: Any numbness, weakness, color change, or reduced blood flow beyond it?

fixed_hard_mass.text: Does it feel hard and fixed in place?

rapid_growth.text: Has it enlarged quickly over days to weeks?

family_history_cancer.text: Any family history of cancer or similar lumps?

multiple_nodes.text: Are there multiple lumps or swollen glands?

loss_of_consciousness.text: Did you black out or lose consciousness?

neck_or_back_pain.text: Any neck pain or back pain?

headache_or_vomiting.text: Any headache, repeated vomiting, or confusion since the injury?

urinary_or_bowel_change.text: Any trouble passing urine or loss of bowel or bladder control?

major_bleeding.text: Was there heavy bleeding or are you soaking dressings?

distal_color_coldness_or_pulselessness.text: Is the hand or foot beyond the injury cold, pale, blue, or without a pulse?

swelling_or_deformity.text: Is there swelling, visible deformity, or a lump where you were injured?

deformity.text: Does it look bent out of shape or dislocated?

chest_pain_or_shortness_of_breath.text: Any chest pain or shortness of breath?
chest_pain_or_shortness_of_breath.ui_label: Chest pain or shortness of breath

weapon_or_high_energy_mechanism.text: Was there high speed, ejection, major fall, weapon, or crush injury?

assault_or_safeguarding_concern.text: Did someone hurt you, or is there any safety concern at home or elsewhere?

discharge_color.text: What color is it — clear, white, yellow, green, brown, blood-stained, or something else?

discharge_consistency.text: What is it like — thin, watery, thick, clumpy, frothy, or something else?

discharge_odor.text: Does it have any noticeable smell, such as fishy or foul, or no strong odor?

itching_or_irritation.text: Is there itching, irritation, soreness, or burning around the vagina or vulva?

heavy_or_unusual_bleeding.text: Any heavy bleeding, bleeding between periods, or bleeding that feels unusual for you?

postcoital_or_postmenopausal_bleeding.text: Any bleeding after sex, or bleeding after menopause?

dyspareunia.text: If it is okay to ask, is there pain during sex?

lower_abdominal_or_pelvic_pain.text: Any lower abdominal or pelvic pain with it?

sexual_history.text: I ask this routinely because it can affect the cause and tests. Only share what you are comfortable sharing: are you sexually active?

recent_unprotected_sex.text: Any recent sex without barrier protection?

contraceptive_use.text: What do you use, if anything, to prevent pregnancy or STIs — such as condoms, pills, injections, implant, IUD, or nothing?

genital_ulcers_or_sores.text: Any sores, ulcers, blisters, or cuts around the genital area?

rash_or_skin_change.text: Any rash, redness, or skin change around the vulva or groin?

severe_vulval_pain_or_swelling.text: Any severe pain, marked swelling, or a very tender lump around the vulva?

hematemesis.text: Any blood or coffee-ground material in the vomit?

bilious_vomit.text: Has the vomit been green or yellow like bile?

inability_to_keep_fluids_down.text: Are you unable to keep even sips of fluid down?

low_urine_output.text: Have you been passing much less urine than usual?

orthostatic_dizziness_or_faintness.text: Any dizziness or feeling faint when standing up?

confusion_or_neurologic_change.text: Any confusion, weakness, numbness, or other neurologic change?

medication_trigger.text: Did this begin after a new medicine or treatment?

alcohol_or_toxin_trigger.text: Any alcohol binge, recreational drugs, or toxin exposure?

unusual_food_exposure.text: Did this start after unusual, spoiled, undercooked, or restaurant food?

shared_food_exposure.text: Did anyone who ate the same food become ill?

severe_weakness_or_dehydration.text: Any severe weakness, dizziness, or dehydration?

blood_in_stool_or_melena.text: Any blood in the stool or black tarry stool?

low_mood_or_food_restriction.text: Any depression, reduced intake, or deliberate restriction?

drug_or_alcohol_use.text: Any heavy alcohol or drug use affecting intake?

fatigue.text: Have you felt unusually tired or fatigued?

weight_gain.text: Have you gained weight recently without trying to?

chest_pressure_tightness.text: Have you had chest pressure or tightness?

irregular_heartbeat.text: Have you noticed an irregular heartbeat or skipped beats?

near_syncope.text: Have you felt like you were about to faint?

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.text: Have you woken from sleep short of breath?

exertional_dyspnea.text: Do you get short of breath with exertion more than usual?

claudication.text: Do you get cramping leg pain when you walk that improves with rest?

sputum_production.text: Have you been coughing up sputum or phlegm?

chest_congestion.text: Have you felt chest congestion or a heavy feeling in the chest?

urinary_frequency.text: Have you been passing urine more often than usual?

urinary_urgency.text: Have you had sudden urgency to pass urine?

testicular_pain.text: Have you had testicular pain or swelling?

lightheadedness.text: Have you felt lightheaded or like you might faint?

memory_loss.text: Have you had memory loss or new forgetfulness?

speech_difficulty.text: Have you had trouble speaking or getting words out?

vision_changes.text: Have you noticed any change in vision?

muscle_pain.text: Have you had muscle pain or aching?

limited_range_of_motion.text: Has it been harder to move a joint or body part fully?

lesions.text: Have you noticed any skin lesions, sores, or new marks?

changes_in_moles.text: Have you noticed any changing moles or dark skin spots?

hair_loss.text: Have you had new or unusual hair loss?

heat_intolerance.text: Have you been unusually intolerant of heat?

excessive_thirst.text: Have you been much thirstier than usual?

excessive_urination.text: Have you been passing urine much more than usual?

easy_bleeding.text: Have you been bleeding more easily than usual?

swollen_lymph_nodes.text: Have you noticed swollen glands or lymph nodes?

anemia_symptoms.text: Have you had symptoms of anemia such as unusual tiredness, shortness of breath, or looking pale?

mood_changes.text: Have you had major mood changes?

sleep_disturbance.text: Have you had trouble sleeping or major sleep disturbance?

suicidal_ideation.text: Have you had thoughts of harming yourself or that life is not worth living?

hallucinations.text: Have you heard or seen things that others could not?

dyspepsia.text: Have you had indigestion or upper abdominal burning after meals?

nocturia.text: Have you been waking at night to pass urine more than usual?

menstrual_irregularity.text: Have your periods been irregular or different from usual?

urethral_discharge.text: Have you noticed any discharge from the urethra or penis?

hearing_change.text: Have you had any change in hearing?

paraesthesia.text: Have you had tingling or pins and needles?

selection_guidance.source_basis: Use the curated ROS systems and question sets from the codebook summary template and Hutchison direct-questions framework.

single_complaint.primary_system_questions: exhaust unanswered high-yield concepts first within budget
single_complaint.secondary_cross_system_questions: then complete other systems in priority order while staying within the same session budget
single_complaint.default_total_ros_questions: 3-5 if low risk; 4-6 if one red flag is active

multiple_complaints.primary_and_secondary_pathological_syste: Exhaust unanswered high-yield concepts for the primary complaint, then the permitted secondary complaint, before lower-yield cross-system ROS.
multiple_complaints.default_total_ros_questions: Usually 6-10 total ROS questions across the session, with override only when safety concerns remain unresolved.

selection_guidance.do_not_repeat_rule: If a symptom clerking question already captured the concept directly or by derived equivalent, keep the ROS item available in the bank but skip it for that session.
evidence_basis: Hutchison direct questions about bodily systems not covered by the presenting complaint
User codebook ROS sections and summary template system headings
selection_guidance.non_repeat_rule: If a symptom question, derived field, shared history item, or previously rendered ROS question already covered the concept, do not render it again in the session.
selection_guidance.session_cap_note: ROS shares the same session cap and must not become a second full interview.

selection_note: Exhaust the systems in focus first, then add up to 2 questions from each other system that has not already been covered, always respecting the hard session cap.
iteration_order_source: Use rendering_rules.system_display_order if present for system order; within each system iterate only by canonical_system_catalog[system] field order, never by raw dict iteration over questions.

runtime_iteration_contract.questions_storage_shape: dict keyed by field id for lookup performance
runtime_iteration_contract.system_iteration_rule: Iterate primary pathological system first, then secondary pathological system if present, then follow rendering_rules.system_display_order for remaining systems.
runtime_iteration_contract.intra_system_iteration_rule: Use canonical_system_catalog[system] to determine the order of fields within a system.

system_resolution_note: When a complaint's targeted_ros references a system like 'constitutional', the engine should include ALL sub-systems that start with that prefix (e.g., constitutional_dehydration, constitutional_infectious). Sub-system questions are selected by relevance to the active complaint, not by exhaustive enumeration.
